svg.title: How 8 sampling points become a (N_total, 12) tensor
svg.desc: Data flow from buildings to sampling points to row vector to stacked tensor
svg.text: From buildings to tensor: data assembly pipeline
One row = one sampling location → 12 values

g.text: across all buildings, all 920 cases → saved as tensor_data.npz

svg.text: Slice by col 9 (z_max) → aggregate by height | Slice by col 10 (thick) → aggregate by thickness
